name: RiverNorth Opportunities Fund Inc. 6.00% Series A Perpetual Preferred Stock
summary: RiverNorth Opportunities Fund Inc. 6.00% Series A Perpetual Preferred Stock is a closed-end fund issuing preferred shares. This preferred stock has a 6.00% dividend and has a higher claim on assets and earnings than common stock. RiverNorth specializes in fixed income investments, including municipal and corporate bonds, among others.
